tex_content:
Utkarsh Singh
Senior DevOps Engineer (AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Observability, Automation)
Dublin, Ireland | +353 892515620 | 254utkarsh@gmail.com
github.com/UT07 | linkedin.com/in/utkarshsingh2001 | utworld.netlify.app
Summary
Senior DevOps Engineer with 3 years of production experience designing, automating, and operating scalable
cloud infrastructure on AWS. Proven expertise in Kubernetes (EKS), Terraform, CI/CD (GitHub Actions,
Jenkins, CodePipeline), observability (Prometheus/Grafana, CloudWatch, PagerDuty), and SRE practices.
Reduced MTTR by 35
Technical Skills
• Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (EKS, EC2, ECS/Fargate, Lambda, VPC, ALB/NLB, RDS/Aurora,
DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, Route53, SQS/SNS, IAM, KMS, Secrets Manager, API Gateway, X-Ray),
Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Functions)
• IaC & Automation: Terraform (modules, remote state, workspaces), Ansible (playbooks, Tower), AWS
CloudFormation/SAM; Python/Bash tooling for toil elimination and ops workflows
• Containers & Orchestration: Docker (multi-stage, multi-arch), Kubernetes/EKS (Helm, RBAC, health
probes, HPA, cluster autoscaling), Docker Compose, ECR; rollout strategies (blue/green, canary)
• CI/CD & Release Engineering: GitHub Actions, Jenkins (shared libraries), AWS
CodePipeline/CodeDeploy, Bitbucket Pipelines, Git; automated test gates (pytest/Jest), pipeline
troubleshooting, release health monitoring
• Observability & SRE: Prometheus/Grafana, CloudWatch (Logs/Metrics/Alarms), PagerDuty (on-call,
escalation policies), AWS X-Ray; SLO/SLI tracking, capacity planning, RCA, blameless postmortems,
runbooks, alert tuning
• Programming & Scripting: Python (boto3, FastAPI, Flask, automation scripts), TypeScript/JavaScript,
Node.js, Bash, SQL/PostgreSQL
• Security & Compliance: container and dependency scanning (Trivy, Snyk), secrets hygiene, least-privilege
IAM, SAST/DAST integration (SonarCloud, OWASP ZAP), GDPR-aligned data handling
• Linux & Networking: Linux/Ubuntu, process/resource debugging (strace, top, lsof), TCP/IP,
HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, SSL/TLS, reverse proxies (Caddy, Nginx)
Experience
Clover IT Services – New York, NY (Remote) Jun 2022 – Jul 2024
Site Reliability / DevOps Engineer
• Owned reliability for a multi-account, multi-region AWS SaaS platform (5+ accounts, 3 regions, 8
microservices); primary on-call engineer coordinating incident response, triage, and release health across
Dev/Test/Prod.
• Led end-to-end incident management — triage, root cause analysis, blameless postmortems, and Jira-tracked
remediation; authored runbooks and release checklists for critical services; reduced MTTR by 35%.
• Designed and implemented full-stack observability (Prometheus/Grafana, CloudWatch, X-Ray, PagerDuty)
with SLO/SLI tracking, proactive alerting, and distributed tracing — enabling faster root cause isolation
across services.
• Built self-service infrastructure using reusable Terraform modules (remote state, workspaces) and Ansible
Tower playbooks; cut environment spin-up time by 60%, eliminated configuration drift, and delivered 22%
cost reduction through right-sizing and capacity analysis.
• Rebuilt CI/CD pipelines for 10+ services (Jenkins shared libraries, CodePipeline/CodeDeploy) with
automated pytest/Jest test gates; reduced release lead time from 3 days to 4–6 hours (85% improvement).
• Containerised microservices with multi-stage Docker builds; deployed to EKS via Helm with safe rollout
strategies and Trivy/Snyk scanning; sustained 99.9% uptime with zero rollback incidents.
• Wrote and reviewed production code: built reusable Python/Bash automation for operational toil elimination,
contributed service-level code fixes during incidents, and conducted regular code reviews enforcing style,
testability, and efficiency standards.
Seattle Kraken (NHL) – Seattle, WA Jun 2021 – May 2022
Data Analyst Intern
• Automated analytics reporting pipelines in Python and improved ingestion/validation workflows using
PySpark and Azure Data Factory; reduced weekly report preparation time by 30% and reconciled
discrepancies across 500K+ records.
• Partnered with engineering to debug ETL reliability issues, improve data freshness, and contribute
documentation for stakeholder reporting workflows.
Featured Projects
Purrrfect Keys – AI Piano Learning App (Google Firebase) Jan 2026 – Present
expo.dev/accounts/ut254/projects/purrrfect-keys | React Native, TypeScript, Firebase
Auth/Firestore/Functions, GitHub Actions, Jest, Maestro
• Designed and built a cross-platform app end-to-end using Google Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Cloud
Functions) as the backend platform; implemented GDPR-aligned user data deletion via Firebase Functions,
real-time data sync through Firestore, and secure authentication flows.
• Engineered low-latency audio performance (<10ms touch-to-sound) with a native audio layer, pitch detection
via ONNX inference, and AI-generated lesson content; shipped with production-grade CI/CD (GitHub
Actions + EAS) and 2,630 Jest tests across 122 suites.
WhatsTheCraic – Live Event Discovery Platform Apr 2025 – Jul 2025
https://whatsthecraic.run.place | Node.js/Express, React, FastAPI, MySQL, DynamoDB, Docker, AWS,
GitHub Actions
• Built a 6-microservice event platform ingesting 4 external APIs with normalization + deduplication; deployed
on AWS EC2 using Docker Compose, Caddy auto-TLS, and Route53 across 4 production subdomains.
• Shipped production-grade ops: GitHub Actions CI/CD + automated smoke tests, SSM-based remote
operations, rate limiting, and /health//metrics instrumentation (error rate, p95 latency, upstream failure
rate); improved event-save conversion by 18% via A/B-tested ranking logic.
Genomic Benchmarking Platform – MSc Thesis Sep 2025 – Dec 2025
github.com/UT07/qpAdm-Genomic-Benchmarking | Terraform, Docker, Snakemake, EC2 Auto Scaling, S3,
CloudWatch, Python, Bash
• Built a fully automated AWS benchmarking pipeline: Terraform-provisioned Auto Scaling Groups launched
10,700+ ephemeral Graviton3 workers, executed containerised Snakemake workloads from S3, emitted
CloudWatch metrics, and self-terminated with zero manual intervention.
• Validated reproducibility across instance families and optimized for cost/performance: identified c7g optimal
at $0.006/run, achieved 66% cost reduction via Spot Instances, and eliminated 99% preprocessing overhead
through EIGENSTRAT precomputation.
Education
National College of Ireland, Dublin, Ireland Sep 2024 – Jan 2026
MSc Cloud Computing
• Coursework: Cloud Architectures, Cloud DevOpsSec, Scalable Cloud Programming, Cloud Machine
Learning, Data Governance/Compliance/Ethics, Research in Computing.
Southern New Hampshire University, Manchester, NH Aug 2023 – May 2024
BS Computer Science – Software Dev Lifecycle, Full-Stack, Database Systems, Software Testing
The University of Texas at Arlington, Arlington, TX Aug 2019 – May 2022
BS Software Engineering (Coursework, Transferred) – Algorithms & DS, Operating Systems, Computer
Networks, Information Security | TA: CSE 3318 Data Structures & Algorithms (50+ students)
Certifications
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02) Issued Mar 2024
• AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C01) Issued Sep 2022
• AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C01) Issued Jun 2022
